news.t: Defiance Launches MRNX: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Moderna, Inc.

holdings.infoBox: MRNX is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 63.41%, MODERNA INC SWAP NOMURA-L at 43.95%, MODERNA INC SWAP MAREX-L at 38.28%, MODERNA INC SWAP CS-L at 37.10%, and MODERNA INC SWAP CF-L at 32.64%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long MRNA ETF (MRNX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Moderna, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRNA), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements MRNX was launched on Feb 3, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches MRNX: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for Moderna, Inc.
data.text: MIAMI, Feb. 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today announced the launch of the  Defiance Daily Target 2X Long MRNA ETF (MRNX) , expanding its lineup of single-stock leveraged ETFs designed f...
